prompt:
[Fantasy Travel Scenery]
A rest under the stars on a journey to reform the world.

What they found mid-journey was a small 'crash cafe' opening in the desert.

The elder took a liking to the starry sky blend, Kaku-san is waiting for a refill, and Suke-san has become close friends with a cat.

Well, which domain will they head to next? It seems only the cat shopkeeper secretly knows.
